chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail application No.S- 922 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For order on statement (withdrawal) 19.01.2018. Mr. Karamullah Memon Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Chetan S. Kella Advocate for applicant, submits that he has definite instruction from learned counsel for applicant that applicant has been acquitted by the trial court, therefore, this bail application has become infructuous and he does not press the same. In this regard a statement is also available on record. Learned A.P.G has recorded no objection. In view of the written statement on record, this bail application has become in fructuous and accordingly disposed of. JUDGE A.Rasheed
